monster_spark.description: Birth call 1: identity words (role/size/temperament feed stats and battle policies) plus the look that feeds card art

monster_voice.description: Birth call 2: the voice - traits, speech style, a want, a battle line; everything talk and negotiation run on
monster_voice.prompt_template:
You are giving a newly met monster its VOICE in a fantasy game. Players will talk with this monster - its voice is what makes it real.

--- The monster ---
{spark_facts}

Write its voice (short entries, one sentence per prose field):
- personality_traits: 2-3 adjectives
- speech_style: HOW it talks - rhythm, vocabulary, verbal tics. Distinctive enough to write dialogue from. (If it cannot speak, how it expresses itself instead.)
- want: the ONE thing it wants most - the lever every negotiation and friendship turns on
- battle_line: its signature line (or display) when confronting intruders, true to that speech style

Respond with ONLY valid JSON in exactly this format:
{{"personality_traits": ["..."], "speech_style": "...", "want": "...", "battle_line": "..."}}

JSON:
